programme.title: ILT20I 2025: Emirates vs Vipers; Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of a cricket match wherein teams compete against each other in order to emerge victorious and win the coveted title.

programme.title: ILT20I 2025: Warriorz vs Giants; Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of a cricket match wherein teams compete against each other in order to emerge victorious and win the coveted title.

programme.title: ILT20I 2025 - Giants vs Warriorz; Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of a cricket match wherein teams compete against each other in order to emerge victorious and win the coveted title.

programme.title: Dubai Capitals vs. Sharjah Warriorz; International League T20 Cricket
programme.desc: Professional cricket teams compete against each other to emerge victorious and win the coveted title of the 2024 International League T20.

programme.title: ILT20I 2025: Emirates vs Giants; Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of a cricket match wherein teams compete against each other in order to emerge victorious and win the coveted title.

programme.title: Dubai Capitals vs. Sharjah Warriorz; International League T20 Cricket
programme.desc: Professional cricket teams compete against each other to emerge victorious and win the coveted title of the 2024 International League T20.

programme.title: ILT20I 2025: Emirates vs Giants; Cricket Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights of a cricket match wherein teams compete against each other in order to emerge victorious and win the coveted title.

programme.title: Dubai Capitals vs. Sharjah Warriorz; International League T20 Cricket
programme.desc: Professional cricket teams compete against each other to emerge victorious and win the coveted title of the 2024 International League T20.

programme.title: The Reunion
programme.desc: Following their father's death, four estranged half-siblings reunite to see what they inherit. But they are surprised when they are forced to work together in order to get their inheritance.

programme.title: Rocket Gang
programme.desc: A group of friends visit a new resort but their excitement is shortlived when they experience supernatural activities and are confronted by the ghosts of some young children.

programme.title: Faraaz
programme.desc: Five terrorists take the staff and customers of Holey Artisan café in Dhaka hostage. Faraaz and his friends are among the hostages as the police try to de-escalate the situation.

programme.title: Return of Wu Kong
programme.desc: Demons exploit Sun Wukong's amnesia, seizing power and causing chaos in the mythical realm as the Monkey King's absence creates a dangerous vacuum.

programme.title: The Real Don Returns 2
programme.desc: Pullu Giri is trying to live a peaceful life and forget his ruffian past. Following an incident, he gets dragged into the affairs of some local gangs.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: Rajiv grows envious of his childhood friend, Chozhan, as he is better than him at most things. The frenemies grow apart only to meet under very different circumstances several years later.

programme.title: Himmatwar
programme.desc: The son of a wealthy man leaves his family post a misunderstanding. Later, when he saves a police officer from an evil man, this results in him earning the latter's wrath.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Baaghi
programme.desc: Determined to rescue his former love, the ruggedly handsome Ronny confronts his enemies with a flurry of powerful roundhouse kicks and bone-crushing punches.

programme.title: Singh Is Kinng
programme.desc: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.

programme.title: The Reunion
programme.desc: Long after high school, Ricky has embraced a spiritual lifestyle. But when his childhood nemesis, Travis, is at their reunion, he sets off on a nightmarish journey of confrontation.

programme.title: Faraaz
programme.desc: Five terrorists take the staff and customers of Holey Artisan café in Dhaka hostage. Faraaz and his friends are among the hostages as the police try to de-escalate the situation.

programme.title: Bas Itna Sa Khwaab Hai
programme.desc: Surya moves to Mumbai in a bid to become as successful as his idol, Naved Ali. Later, he gets to work for Naved Ali and realises his dream before discovering his idol's true colours.

programme.title: The Real Don Returns 2
programme.desc: Pullu Giri is trying to live a peaceful life and forget his ruffian past. Following an incident, he gets dragged into the affairs of some local gangs.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

programme.title: Enemy
programme.desc: Rajiv grows envious of his childhood friend, Chozhan, as he is better than him at most things. The frenemies grow apart only to meet under very different circumstances several years later.

programme.title: Himmatwar
programme.desc: The son of a wealthy man leaves his family post a misunderstanding. Later, when he saves a police officer from an evil man, this results in him earning the latter's wrath.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Baaghi
programme.desc: Raja loves Rani, but she commits suicide after falling prey to Manmohan, who wants her at any cost. A devastated Raja turns to the world of crime and becomes a professional killer.

programme.title: Singh Is Kinng
programme.desc: Happy, notoriously famous for his antics, is sent to fetch Lakhan so that he can meet his ailing father. But, in Australia, Happy ends up taking Lakhan's place as the king of the local underworld.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Comedy Circus Ke Ajoobe
programme.desc: Various renowned celebrities team-up with standup comedians to perform hilarious and satirical skits, competing with one another to take home the winning title.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti gets engaged to Sweety, upsetting Anita and Angoori. Meanwhile, Teeka, Malkhan, and Tillu accidentally abduct Daroga while attempting to kidnap the Commissioner in a burkha.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Teeka, Malkhan, and Tillu kidnap a disguised Daroga. After a wedding mishap, Ammaji builds a wall that blocks the neighbors' views. Manmohan and Vibhuti's plan to remove it ends in a literal crash.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti frames Manmohan for his own mischief, leading to Manmohan's thrashing. As revenge, Manmohan fakes 'Judwa Mania,' pretending to feel Vibhuti's pain, while Angoori's coldness upsets Vibhuti.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Anita threatens the trio for bringing a fake madman. To annoy Manmohan, Vibhuti pays to be beaten, while Manmohan fakes "Judwa Mania" pain. Later, Vibhuti goads Angoori into hitting him.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Anita tells Angoori what her favourite author thinks about husbands lying to their wives. Later, Angoori feels hurt after hearing Manmohan and Vibhuti's thoughts about her singing.

programme.title: A Flying Jatt
programme.desc: Aman who is scared of heights, discovers his superpowers when he is forced to face the evil Raka, who is sent by an industrialist to destroy humanity.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Anita saves the Commissioner and becomes an Inspector, demoting Happu. Meanwhile, Vibhuti hears Ammaji's ritual for Manmohan's business and tells Angoori he knows a dacoit who can help.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Anita's strictness scares Manmohan, while Vibhuti's dacoit disguise leads to his abduction by a real criminal. Forced to loot, Vibhuti finds no help, and Manmohan gets himself arrested by Anita.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti loots Manmohan as Anjana Singh but is betrayed by the real Anjana. After escaping Anita's gunpoint with Angoori's help, Manmohan ousts Angoori, and Vibhuti is taken to Gulfam Kali.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
programme.desc: Kanha seeks shelter beneath a towering tree as Rahu unleashes mystical flames. Meanwhile, Nand and Yashodha's disparaging remarks towards Kanha pique Sage Gargacharya's curiosity.

programme.title: Raat Ka Khel Saara
programme.desc: During his youngest son's engagement, Anna Naik is found dead, casting a shadow over the family reunion. Subsequently, strange occurrences begin to unfold in the ancestral home.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Angoori runs into Vibhuti who behaves strangely in front of her. Later, Vibhuti impersonates Santiram and appears before Masterji and Manmohan who try to reveal his identity.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Santiram begins to terrorise the members of Modern Colony one by one. Soon, he invites everyone to attend his class as part of his mission to educate them.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Santiram begins to terrorise the members of Modern Colony one by one. Soon, he invites everyone to attend his class as part of his mission to educate them.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Manmohan tries to spot Anita through his binoculars but notices Vibhuti doing the same; Vibhuti holds the torchlight as Angoori applies ointment on Manmohan's knees.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Manmohan drags Deepu home and orders him to clean the kitchen. Meanwhile, Anita asks Vibhuti about his day and he tells her that his body hurts from doing all the work.

programme.title: Bhabi ji Ghar Par Hai!
programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.

programme.desc: Vibhuti Narayan Mishra and Manmohan Tiwari live in the same neighbourhood in Kanpur. They both try to impress each other's wives but end up landing in peculiar situations.
